# About

This is the **About** page of the Quarto tutorial.

## About This Tutorial

This tutorial demonstrates how to use Quarto for:

- Writing scientific documents
- Creating websites
- Publishing reproducible research

## About Quarto

Quarto is a modern publishing system that supports:

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Multi-language | Python, R, Julia, Observable |
| Multiple formats | HTML, PDF, Word, ePub |
| Reproducibility | Code execution + output |
| Extensions | Citations, math, diagrams |

## License

This tutorial and demo website are licensed under the MIT License.

[Go back to Home](index.qmd)
